title: Qncognito's Clear Hotbar
description:
Just as simple as it sounds:
A crystal clear hotbar for all your minimalistic needs!
body:
## If clean GUIs are up your alley, this resource pack is just for you!
![enter image description here](https://i.ibb.co/1ngKsMq/Clear-Hotbar-Cover.png)
***This pack removes the ugly gray hotbar slots in favor of letting your inventory do do the talking. All that remains is the white item "selector" that moves as you select each item.***

---
**Why opt for a clear hotbar?**
- Fewer unnecessary elements taking up your screen
- Easier to see the game behind your HUD
- Far cleaner look than the textured, gray slots
- Empty hotbars no longer take up screen space
